evidence.claim: The system allocates 5-minute time slots for flights.
evidence.fact: The system allocates each flight the earliest available 5-minute slot on either runway at or after its estimated time.
evidence.fact_span: allocates each flight the earliest available 5-minute slot

evidence.claim: Each flight receives a dedicated 5-minute slot.
evidence.fact: The system allocates each flight the earliest available 5-minute slot on either runway at or after its estimated time.
evidence.user_story_span: Each flight receives a dedicated 5-minute slot
evidence.fact_span: allocates each flight the earliest available 5-minute slot

evidence.claim: A 3-minute gap is enforced between the end of one slot and the start of the next slot.
evidence.fact: The system enforces a 3-minute separation gap between consecutive slots on the same runway.
evidence.fact_span: enforces a 3-minute separation gap between consecutive slots
